prohibitedPatterns.label: previous review reference
prohibitedPatterns.description: References to previous reviews anchor the reviewer toward confirming past conclusions rather than fresh evaluation

prohibitedPatterns.label: known issue reference
prohibitedPatterns.description: References to known issues anchor the reviewer toward validating specific problems rather than conducting independent analysis

prohibitedPatterns.label: fix reference
prohibitedPatterns.description: References to fixes anchor the reviewer toward validating changes rather than independently assessing current state

prohibitedPatterns.label: expected outcome
prohibitedPatterns.description: Expected outcomes anchor the reviewer toward confirming predictions rather than independent judgment

prohibitedPatterns.label: focus direction
prohibitedPatterns.description: Directing reviewer focus violates zero-context principle; reviewer must determine what to examine

prohibitedPatterns.label: suspicion sharing
prohibitedPatterns.description: Sharing suspicions anchors the reviewer toward investigating specific areas rather than independent analysis

prohibitedPatterns.label: version reference
prohibitedPatterns.description: Version references (v1, v2) anchor the reviewer toward comparative analysis rather than independent review of current state

prohibitedPatterns.label: priority label
prohibitedPatterns.description: Priority labels from previous reviews anchor the reviewer toward validating existing assessments

prohibitedPatterns.label: revision language
prohibitedPatterns.description: References to revisions anchor the reviewer toward comparative analysis rather than fresh evaluation

prohibitedPatterns.label: authority reference
prohibitedPatterns.description: Authority endorsements create psychological pressure toward PASS verdict rather than independent judgment

prohibitedPatterns.label: timeline pressure
prohibitedPatterns.description: Timeline pressure creates urgency bias that compromises thorough independent review

prohibitedPatterns.label: baseline anchoring
prohibitedPatterns.description: Baseline metrics anchor reviewer to existing levels rather than absolute standards

prohibitedPatterns.label: negative space direction
prohibitedPatterns.description: Negative direction implicitly guides reviewer attention and violates zero-context principle

prohibitedPatterns.label: constraint framing
prohibitedPatterns.description: Constraint framing may be used as excuse for accepting lower quality

prohibitedTerms.label: focus direction
prohibitedTerms.description: 指定复查重点违反零上下文原则；审查者必须独立判断检查内容

prohibitedTerms.label: fix reference
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及修复锚定审查者验证变更而非独立评估当前状态

prohibitedTerms.label: focus direction
prohibitedTerms.description: 指定关注点违反零上下文原则

prohibitedTerms.label: known issue
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及已知问题锚定审查者验证特定问题而非独立分析

prohibitedTerms.label: expected outcome
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及预期结果锚定审查者确认预测而非独立判断

prohibitedTerms.label: previous finding
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及上轮发现锚定审查者确认过去结论而非全新评估

prohibitedTerms.label: verification direction
prohibitedTerms.description: 指定验证内容违反零上下文原则

prohibitedTerms.label: previous reference
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及上一次锚定审查者进行对比分析

prohibitedTerms.label: previous reference
prohibitedTerms.description: 提及之前的情况锚定审查者进行对比分析

prohibitedTerms.label: authority reference
prohibitedTerms.description: 权威背书产生心理压力导向通过判定

prohibitedTerms.label: approval reference
prohibitedTerms.description: 批准引用产生压力偏向通过

prohibitedTerms.label: baseline anchoring
prohibitedTerms.description: 基线指标锚定审查者接受现有水平而非绝对标准

prohibitedTerms.label: negative direction
prohibitedTerms.description: 负向指导隐式引导审查者注意力
